name: Microwave Fruit Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pineapple, rhubarb, and strawberries in a 2-quart microwave-safe bowl or other container.
2. Microwave on high power for 7-10 minutes, stirring twice, until the rhubarb is tender.
3. Stir in the fruit pectin; microwave on high for 2-4 minutes, until the mixture boils, stirring every minute.
4. Stir in all remaining ingredients. Microwave on high for 2-4 more minutes to allow the jam to boil hard, stirring every other minute.
5. Let stand for 10 minutes, then pour into sterilized jars. Seal and let cool before refrigerating.
Yield: about 4 jelly jar sized servings.
